# Synthetic Workbench Note

This synthetic paragraph describes a document maintenance workflow. It contains no patient facts, clinical recommendations, diagnoses, or dosing details.

## Provenance Checks

Each derived record in this fixture is expected to keep a stable locator, quoted text, and checksum so tests can verify provenance plumbing.

The fixture remains generic and non-clinical. It exists only to exercise parser boundaries for source documents and source spans.
